allow: Bash(nvim --headless "+lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local msgs = vim.api.nvim_exec2\('messages', {output=true}\).output; print\('=== messages ==='\); print\(msgs\); vim.cmd\('qa'\) end, 1500\)")
